Army Body Composition

AR 600-9 & AR 40-501  ·  ONE-SITE TAPE TEST  ·  EFFECTIVE JUN 2023

Unofficial
01 Configuration
Standard
Active Duty / Prior Service: Over screening weight → tape test required. AFT ≥465 with ≥80pts/event = body fat exempt.
Non-Prior Service / Recruiting: Stricter weight tables, higher BF% ceilings. Exceeding = disqualified for enlistment.
Gender
Height (inches) 5'10"
Range: 58–80 in  |  Add 6 lbs/in for M above 80"
Weight (lbs) 185
Age 35
02 H/W Screening
Min Weight

lbs / age
H/W Status
—
AR 600-9 Table B-1 — Soldiers under max weight pass with no tape test. Over max → body fat assessment required. Under min → medical eval required.
One-Site Tape Test (if over screening wt)
Measure abdomen at navel, relaxed, normal exhale. Average 3 readings → round to nearest 0.5".
Abdomen circ. (in) — at navel 36.0"

03 Overall Assessment
—
Enter your measurements above.
MAX BODY FAT — PRIOR SERVICE (AR 600-9):
Age 17–20: M 20% · F 30%
Age 21–27: M 22% · F 32%
Age 28–39: M 24% · F 34%
Age 40+: M 26% · F 36%
MAX BODY FAT — ACCESSION (AR 40-501):
Age 17–27: M 26% · F 32%
Age 28–39: M 28% · F 34%
Age 40+: M 30% · F 36%
Exceed = disqualified for enlistment
04 DA Form 5500 / 5501 Generator ▼ EXPAND
Applicant is over screening weight — tape test required. Complete fields below and generate the pre-filled official DA form for signature. The form auto-populates all measurements from the calculator above.

AR 600-9 (TABLE B-1, B-2) · AR 40-501 (TABLE 2-1, 2-2) · ARMY DIRECTIVE 2023-11 (ONE-SITE TAPE) · ARMY DIRECTIVE 2025-17 (AFT EXEMPTION)   |   ONE-SITE FORMULA: MALE BF% = −26.97 − (0.12 × WT) + (1.99 × ABD)  ·  FEMALE BF% = −9.15 − (0.015 × WT) + (1.27 × ABD)   |   NOT FOR OFFICIAL USE
